name: Projects
description: A user-project showcase for Convoro — members publish projects (title, cover image, description, typed custom fields and link buttons) as cards on a /projects page, filterable by category. Each project has a detail page with likes, authors can feature their best work on their profile, and staff moderate submissions while defining the categories, custom fields and button slots. Ships a profile showcase widget and a latest-projects sidebar card. Free first-party extension.
author: Convoro

settings.label: Allow ad-hoc links
settings.help: Let members add their own links on a project beyond the admin-configured button slots.
